rubrics.name: Relevance
rubrics.description: Evaluate how well the response directly addresses each reflection question, stays on topic, and provides meaningful and appropriate insights related to the learning experience.

rubrics.name: Application to Real-World Scenarios
rubrics.description: Evaluate the extent to which the response connects reflections to real-life situations, past experiences, or professional contexts, demonstrating practical applicability of critical thinking.

rubrics.name: Clarity and Structure of Writing
rubrics.description: Evaluate the clarity, coherence, and organization of the response, including logical flow of ideas, readability, and proper structuring of thoughts within the expected word limits.

rubrics.name: Use of Critical Thinking Concepts and Methods
rubrics.description: Evaluate how effectively the response incorporates critical thinking concepts (e.g., biases, fast vs slow thinking, problem framing) and demonstrates depth of analysis and reasoning.
